theme_and_archetype.rationale: The user requested an app that is 'easy to navigate but super nice and cute' aimed at homeless/low-income individuals. Archetype 3 provides an optimistic, approachable, and non-institutional vibe. Adding Neo-Brutalist contrast (thick borders, high-contrast dark text) ensures accessibility and legibility are not compromised by the soft pastels, providing both warmth and utility.

rules: Headings must use Nunito for a friendly, rounded feel.
Body must use Figtree for extreme legibility.
Never use pure black text; use slate-900 or slate-800 to keep it soft.
Tight letter spacing on headings, loose line height on body.
Use warm off-white (#FFFDF9) as the global background to reduce eye strain.
CTAs use the warm Coral (primary) or Mint (secondary) with bold slate-900 text.
Borders are thick and dark (#0F172A) to provide clear structure and 'cute brutalism'.
All interactive elements must pass APCA contrast checks.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: The 'Bento' Grid Protocol with Generous Spacing
rules: Generous padding inside all cards: min p-6, prefer p-8.
Use rounded-3xl or rounded-2xl for all containers to emphasize the 'soft/cute' aesthetic.
Thick borders on containers: border-2 border-slate-900.
Flat, solid shadows for depth instead of blur: shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F172A].
Mobile-first layouts: grid-cols-1 moving to bento grid on larger screens.
Sections must have deep vertical breathing room: py-16 to py-24.

components.buttons: rounded-full border-2 border-slate-900 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F172A] active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none transition-all font-bold
components.cards: rounded-3xl border-2 border-slate-900 shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0F172A] bg-white p-6 sm:p-8
components.inputs: rounded-2xl border-2 border-slate-900 bg-white px-4 py-3 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-primary/30 outline-none text-slate-900 placeholder:text-slate-400
components.tags_badges: rounded-full border-2 border-slate-900 px-3 py-1 text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
shadcn_overrides: Override default Shadcn card components to use the brutalist borders and flat shadows.
Override Dialog and Sheet components to have rounded-3xl corners and border-2.
Never use the default Vercel-look thin borders and soft blurry shadows.

rules: Use spring animations rather than linear easing (e.g., Framer Motion type: 'spring', stiffness: 400, damping: 17).
Hover states should slightly lift the element (-translate-y-1) and increase the flat shadow offset.
Click states (active) must push the element down (translate-y-1) and remove the shadow to feel tactile.

icons_and_assets.icon_rules: Use large, clear icons with a stroke width of 2.5 or 3 to match the friendly/bold aesthetic. Icons should have an absolute background circle (e.g., bg-accent_yellow rounded-full p-3) for emphasis.
icons_and_assets.testing: All interactive elements must include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='resource-card-button').

image_urls.description: Friendly diverse smiling people, showing a welcoming community.
Abstract swirl of blue, pink, and yellow colors for soft background textures.
Colorful floating bubbles on a blue background, to be used in 'cute' empty states or loading screens.
A map with pins, useful as an overlay or background for the resource locator feature.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'Nunito' for headings and 'Figtree' for body via next/font or standard import.
Install 'iconoir-react' for rounded, friendly icons. Run: yarn add iconoir-react
Install 'framer-motion' for bouncy micro-interactions on cards and buttons.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' approach for the main dashboard showing Job Listings, Resources, Benefits, etc. Make the layout highly asymmetric and fun.
Do NOT use generic Shadcn borders. Override everything to have border-2 border-slate-900 and flat shadows for the 'cute brutalism' effect.
Ensure all buttons and inputs are large (p-4 or p-6) to be easily tapable for users with accessibility needs or older devices.
Apply `data-testid` to all interactive components in kebab-case.
